free_text: Partition of total excitation energy between fragment
pairs in asymmetric and symmetric fission modes
To measure velocities of fission fragments,
Length and time resolution are 56.5 (43.4) cm
Calibration: Flight time and energy were calibrated by
the emitted and recoiling nuclei from elastic
scattering of 240 MeV 127I beams on natAg, natIn,
Start and stop counter of ToF1 to measure
To measure kinetic energies of fission fragments
at 50.5 deg with solid angle of 0.167 msr and
Counter of ToF2 to measure velocity of
Counter of ToF2 to measure velocity of
A new correction procedure was proposed and applied to
observed fission data affected by instrumental
fluctuations in measurements of flight time and
kinetic energies of secondary fragments. See Sect.
IIIB of the reference for the procedure of correction.
Average excitation energy of a fragment for
See NRDF D1905 DATA,49 for detail.

See NRDF D1905 DATA,50 for detail.
Total average excitation energy of fragment
pairs for the asymmetric fission mode
See NRDF D1905 DATA,51 for detail.
Total average excitation energy of fragment
pairs for the symmetric fission mode
See NRDF D1905 DATA,52 for detail.
